2603.22331.title: Conformal Risk Control for Safety-Critical Wildfire Evacuation Mapping: A Comparative Study of Tabular, Spatial, and Graph-Based Models
2603.22331.paper_summary: Every wildfire prediction model deployed today shares a dangerous property: none of these methods provides formal guarantees on how much fire spread is missed. Despite extensive work on wildfire spread prediction using deep learning, no prior study has applied distribution-free safety guarantees to this domain, leaving evacuation planners reliant on probability thresholds with no formal assurance. We address this gap by presenting, to our knowledge, the first application of conformal risk control (CRC) to wildfire spread prediction, providing finite-sample guarantees on false negative rate (FNR <= 0.05). We expose a stark failure: across three model families of increasing complexity (tabular: LightGBM, AUROC 0.854; convolutional: Tiny U-Net, AUROC 0.969; and graph-based: Hybrid ResGNN-UNet, AUROC 0.964), standard thresholds capture only 7-72% of true fire spread. CRC eliminates this failure uniformly. Our central finding is that model architecture determines evacuation efficiency, while CRC determines safety: both spatial models with CRC achieve approximately 95% fire coverage while flagging only approximately 15% of total pixels, making them 4.2x more efficient than LightGBM, while the graph model's additional complexity over a simple U-Net yields no meaningful efficiency gain. We propose a shift-aware three-way CRC framework that assigns SAFE/MONITOR/EVACUATE zones for operational triage, and characterize a fundamental limitation of prevalence-weighted bounds under extreme class imbalance (approximately 5% fire prevalence). All models, calibration code, and evaluation pipelines are released for reproducibility.
2603.22331.paper_summary_zh: 每個當前部署的野火預測模型都具有一個危險的特性：這些方法都未提供對於漏報火勢擴散的正式保證。儘管在使用深度學習進行野火擴散預測方面進行了廣泛的研究，但之前的研究沒有將無分佈安全保證應用於這一領域，這使得撤離規劃者依賴於沒有正式保證的概率閾值。我們通過提出，據我們所知，首次將符合風險控制（CRC）應用於野火擴散預測，來填補這一空白，提供對假陰性率（FNR <= 0.05）的有限樣本保證。我們揭示了一個明顯的失敗：在三個日益複雜的模型系列中（表格型：LightGBM，AUROC 0.854；卷積型：Tiny U-Net，AUROC 0.969；基於圖的：Hybrid ResGNN-UNet，AUROC 0.964），標準閾值僅捕捉到7-72%的真實火勢擴散。CRC均勻地消除了這一失敗。我們的中心發現是模型架構決定了撤離效率，而CRC決定了安全性：兩個帶有CRC的空間模型實現了大約95%的火災覆蓋，同時僅標記了大約15%的總像素，使其比LightGBM效率高出4.2倍，而圖模型相對於簡單的U-Net的額外複雜性並未帶來任何有意義的效率增益。我們提出了一個具備轉變感知的三路CRC框架，為操作性分診分配SAFE/MONITOR/EVACUATE區域，並描述了在極端類別不平衡（約5%的火災流行率）下流行權重界限的基本限制。所有模型、校準代碼和評估管道均已釋放以便重現。
2603.22331.author: Baljinnyam Dayan et.al.
